escalation.rationale: Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Iran regarding Strait of Hormuz closure creates imminent escalation risk with threats to target Iranian power plants.

ticker_items: Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to reopen Strait of Hormuz
Pentagon requests $200bn for Iran war operations
Iranian missiles wound ~100 in Israeli southern towns
British submarine HMS Anson deployed to Arabian Sea
IEA warns of 'very severe' global energy crisis

new_entrant.text: Britain has deployed nuclear-powered submarine HMS Anson with Tomahawk missiles to Arabian Sea.

middle_east.description: Iranian missile strikes wounded more than 100 people in two southern Israeli towns.
Blasts heard and air raid sirens sounded in Jerusalem after Israeli military warned of incoming missile fire.

today.incident: Iranian missile strikes on southern Israel

claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 in Iran, 18 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 21 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: We will obliterate Iran's power plants if it doesn't fully open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Pentagon requesting $200bn signals that war will stretch on a very long time
middle_east.speaker: Unknown analyst
middle_east.title: Military analyst

observers.description: Britain has deployed nuclear-powered submarine HMS Anson to Arabian Sea with Tomahawk missile capability. This represents direct military involvement in potential escalation against Iran.
China is maintaining neutrality in Iran war according to analysts. Beijing appears to be playing long game while US is distracted by Middle East conflict.
Danish election shaped by Trump's Greenland grab has elevated foreign and security policy concerns. Voters experiencing major shifts on Europe, defense and energy policies.

financial.notes: Oil prices soaring as Strait of Hormuz closure halts one-fifth of world's oil and gas supply creating global energy crisis.

update_log.text: IEA chief warns of very severe global energy crisis as Iran war hits supply
Pentagon requesting $200bn for Iran war operations signaling long-term conflict
Iranian missile strikes wound over 100 people in southern Israeli towns
British submarine HMS Anson deployed to Arabian Sea with Tomahawk missiles
